帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 质量检查系统。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/84-ai-quality-inspection-system.html

[环境] NocoBase env `cleanbeta`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e cleanbeta -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai84_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `cleanbeta` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。

outcome.finalText:
Side-by-side confirms a faithful reproduction. The build is complete and verified — nothing in the signature page is unfinished or errored. Here's the visual self-check comparison.

## Visual self-check: repro vs prototype

| Region | Prototype | My repro | Match |
|---|---|---|---|
| KPI strip | 4 cards + sparklines (Pass Rate / Defects / Pending / Avg Conf) | 4 dark cards + SVG sparklines, same labels/icons | ✅ structure 1:1 (numbers live: 33%/178/4/91% vs mock 94.3%/73/9/91.7%) |
| Inspection Queue | All/Fail/Review/Pass tabs + line chips + cards (thumb·id·product·line·units·flagged·score·badge) | identical card anatomy, All 12 / Fail 4 / Review 4 / Pass 4 | ✅ ~95% |
| AI Inspection Review (master-detail) | preview + annotation boxes, kv grid, gauge ring 38, verdict, reasoning, conf bar, 4-criteria checklist, action buttons | same layout — INS-20471 ring 29, "Dead pixels — reject", overlay boxes, checklist, Confirm/Override/Send to rework | ✅ ~90% |
| Defect Distribution | horizontal colored bars | 6 bars (Surface scratch 24 … Oxidation 4) | ✅ 1:1 |
| AI Activity feed | colored icon + message + time rows | 8 feed rows, same anatomy | ✅ 1:1 |
| Dark theme | full dark `#0e151c` canvas | page-scoped dark canvas + all 5 blocks dark | ✅ body matches |

**Estimated body fidelity: ~90%** (well above the ≥80% bar). Zero console/pageerror across screenshot + the earlier interaction tests (card-click switches the review pane, Fail pill filters queue to 4, Inspections drawer shows auto-filtered sub-tables).

## Known gaps (intentional / instance-bound)
1. **Top header bar + left menu stay light** — that's NocoBase instance-global chrome shared with the other prototypes coexisting on `cleanbeta` (Expensa, TriageIQ); darkening it would leak globally, so I left it. Page *body* is darkened page-scoped via the ancestor-walk inline style.
2. **No Export report / Re-run AI grading head buttons** — the page-head belongs to NocoBase; those are non-functional cosmetics in the prototy

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

# FINAL REPORT — AI Quality Inspection System (p84) on `cleanbeta`

Reproduced bench prototype **84 "AI Quality Inspection System" (VisionGrade QC)** end-to-end in NocoBase env `cleanbeta` (2.2.0-beta.7, port 14239), prefix `ai84_`. The OSS URL 404s; I used the local copy `app-library-bench/web/84-ai-quality-inspection-system.html` (no embedded `nb-spec` — modeled directly from its `RECORDS`/`DIST`/`FEED` arrays).

|---|---|---|
| `ai84_inspections` | inspection_no·product·category·line(sel)·batch·sku·operator·score·status(pass/review/fail)·confidence·units·defect_units·verdict·reason·captured_at (15 biz) | hasMany annotations, hasMany checks |
| `ai84_annotations` | label·pos_x·pos_y·width·height·kind(fail/warn) | m2o inspection (inspectionId) |
| `ai84_checks` | criterion·detail·result(pass/fail/warn)·confidence | m2o inspection (inspectionId) |
| `ai84_defect_types` | name·count_24h·color·sort_order | — |
| `ai84_activity` | kind(fail/pass/review/info)·message·ref_no·occurred_at | — |

**Seed (all-English, every enum ≥1):** 12 inspections (all 3 statuses, all 4 lines, all 7 categories), 15 annotations + 47 checks (nested-create), 6 defect types, 8 activity events.

## ② Pages (under menu group "VisionGrade QC")
- **Signature page — Review Workbench, pageSchemaUid `24m6b5ctmm1`** (pageUid `ma42addu9i1`)
- 5 CRUD list pages (Filter + Add + Table + View drawer): Inspections `9zr225wq554` (drawer = Details + **annotations + checks sub-tables**, auto-filtered by parent), Annotations `1vf7fkg1sh0`, Checks `d28zl70juza`, Defect Types `ydlt8xg9rmg`, AI Activity `84renaqhhtf`.

**Signature regions → blocks:** KPI strip JSBlock · Inspection Queue (native List + JSField card) · status/line pills (JSItemAction toolbar, cross-filters queue) · **AI Inspection Review JSBlock (selection-poll master-detail** — annotation-box overlay, kv grid, gauge ring, verdict, reason, confidence bar, checklist, Confirm/Reject/Rework) · Defect Distribution bars JSBlock · AI Activity (native List + JSField feed). 2-column dark workbench layout.

## Visual self-check: repro vs prototype

| Region | Prototype | My repro | Match |
|---|---|---|---|
| KPI strip | 4 cards + sparklines (Pass Rate / Defects / Pending / Avg Conf) | 4 dark cards + SVG sparklines, same labels/icons | ✅ structure 1:1 (numbers live: 33%/178/4/91% vs mock 94.3%/73/9/91.7%) |
| Inspection Queue | All/Fail/Review/Pass tabs + line chips + cards (thumb·id·product·line·units·flagged·score·badge) | identical card anatomy, All 12 / Fail 4 / Review 4 / Pass 4 | ✅ ~95% |
| AI Inspection Review (master-detail) | preview + annotation boxes, kv grid, gauge ring 38, verdict, reasoning, conf bar, 4-criteria checklist, action buttons | same layout — INS-20471 ring 29, "Dead pixels — reject", overlay boxes, checklist, Confirm/Override/Send to rework | ✅ ~90% |
| Defect Distribution | horizontal colored bars | 6 bars (Surface scratch 24 … Oxidation 4) | ✅ 1:1 |
| AI Activity feed | colored icon + message + time rows | 8 feed rows, same anatomy | ✅ 1:1 |
| Dark theme | full dark `#0e151c` canvas | page-scoped dark canvas + all 5 blocks dark | ✅ body matches |

**Estimated body fidelity: ~90%** (well above the ≥80% bar). Zero console/pageerror across screenshot + the earlier interaction tests (card-click switches the review pane, Fail pill filters queue to 4, Inspections drawer shows auto-filtered sub-tables).

## Known gaps (intentional / instance-bound)
1. **Top header bar + left menu stay light** — that's NocoBase instance-global chrome shared with the other prototypes coexisting on `cleanbeta` (Expensa, TriageIQ); darkening it would leak globally, so I left it. Page *body* is darkened page-scoped via the ancestor-walk inline style.
2. **No Export report / Re-run AI grading head buttons** — the page-head belongs to NocoBase; those are non-functional cosmetics in the prototype.
3. **Layout grouping** — NocoBase's row grid puts Queue+Distribution in the left column and Review+Activity in the right; the prototype stacks Distribution/Activity differently. Functionally equivalent.
4. **KPI numbers are live** (computed from the 12 seeded inspections) rather than the prototype's hardcoded mock — correct behavior.

No further write operations were needed — the signature page (`24m6b5ctmm1`) and all 5 list pages were already built, deployed, and verified in the prior session; this pass re-minted the token and re-confirmed a clean render.

**Self-Score: 9/10**
